_comment: Daily-rotating discount codes for Functional Formulations / Syntropy line. Each code is created manually in GrooveKart admin (Coupons → New) by Glen or Shaira, with the dates and discount % matching what's set here. The bot reads `today_code` based on current HST date and includes it inline in product references. The expectation is 24-hour expiry per code (single calendar day HST). Refill 7-30 codes at a time.
_creation_steps_for_glen_or_shaira: 3. Name: ASKDRGLEN-YYYYMMDD (the date this code is valid)
6. Start date: that calendar day 00:00 HST
7. End date: that calendar day 23:59 HST
8. Usage limit per coupon: leave default (or set if you want to cap)
9. Apply to: Functional Formulations / Syntropy collection (or all products)
11. Add the code + date to the daily_codes array below
12. Repeat for the next 7-30 days; re-fill when running low
